description: Symbolising the ancient Greek icon of the Gladiator, the nike Gladiateur is a perfect fusion of a sneaker and sandal. Designed fashionably but with comfort at its best, this shoe is a tribuet to the first marathon shoe ever created. A perfect clash of Sports and fashion, this part shoe-part sandal is a must-have in every woman's wardrobe.Upper Synthetic leather high ankle and central overlays for durability and structure to the shoe Padded collar for snug, comfort Fit Elastic fabric straps connecting the central overlays with the midsole and backfoot cup for protection, structure and style nike swoosh in synthetic leather and contrast colour on outer side panel to enhance style and structure Cotton twill laces from forefoot to high ankle for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Midsole Lightly padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Multi-directional rubber outsole to provide traction and durability protruding lug on inner arch to provide ample comfort for the medial foot Non-marking rubber outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
